name: ai-tool-watch
description: A structured, version-controlled reference tracking 18 AI capabilities across 6 products with 72 implementations. Updated weekly via multi-model verification cascade.

capabilities.description: Read-only access to AI capability, product, and implementation data with search and comparison support.

api.stability: Paths and field names are stable within v1. New fields may be added.

endpoints.description: API manifest with all available file paths and counts
All capabilities with search terms, definitions, and cross-links
All products with provider links and implementation lists
All implementations with plan/surface availability and evidence
All providers with logos, websites, and product lists
Open-model records with deployment modes and constraints
Evidence records with sources, changelog, and verification dates
Capability x product availability grid with best-gating per cell
Pairwise product capability overlap for all hosted product pairs
Per-product breakdown of what each subscription plan unlocks

mcp.description: Read-only MCP server with 15 tools for querying capabilities, products, implementations, and evidence.

tools.name: list_capabilities
tools.description: List all capabilities with IDs, names, and groups

tools.name: get_capability
tools.description: Full details for a capability by ID

tools.name: list_products
tools.description: List products, optionally filter by kind (hosted/runtime)

tools.name: get_product
tools.description: Full details for a product including plan names

tools.name: compare_products
tools.description: Pairwise capability overlap between two products

tools.name: check_availability
tools.description: Whether a product implements a capability, with gating and plan details

tools.name: search
tools.description: Keyword search across capabilities, products, implementations, and models

tools.name: get_plan
tools.description: Capabilities and implementations included in a specific product plan

tools.name: list_providers
tools.description: All providers with websites, status pages, and product lists

tools.name: get_provider
tools.description: Full details for a provider by ID

tools.name: find_products_by_capabilities
tools.description: Find products supporting ALL specified capabilities

tools.name: get_evidence
tools.description: Verification sources, changelog, and freshness dates for an implementation

tools.name: list_model_access
tools.description: All open/self-hostable models with deployment modes

tools.name: get_model_access
tools.description: Full details for an open model by ID

tools.name: get_staleness_report
tools.description: Evidence records whose verified date exceeds a threshold
